title: CCL - UI
scenario: Conversation Clarity Limiter settings UI displays three noise block options with descriptions in Device Settings > Advanced
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the description text below the CCL heading
Observe the three radio button options: 'No Noise Block', 'AI Noise Block', 'UC Noise Block'
Tap on each radio button option and observe the sub-description displayed
expected: The CCL setting is displayed with the description "Limit the amount of nearby conversation transmitted through your microphone. (Note: changes will take effect on the next call.)" and three radio button options: No Noise Block with sub-description "Optimized for voice isolation", AI Noise Block with sub-description "Enhanced for hybrid work environments", and UC Noise Block with sub-description "Best for open office environments". Each option is selectable and displays its corresponding sub-description.
